choosePlan.title: Choose Your Plan
choosePlan.subtitle: Every plan includes a 7-day free trial. No charge until your trial ends.
choosePlan.enterpriseDesc: Unlimited analyses, custom integrations, dedicated support, and SLA.
choosePlan.guarantee: Cancel anytime during your trial — no questions asked.
choosePlan.error: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
choosePlan.notAdminBody: Your organization's billing plan hasn't been configured yet, or you don't have permission to set it up. Please ask your organization admin to log in and select a plan.

billing.title: Billing
billing.upgradeMailBody: Hi CauseFlow team,%0D%0A%0D%0AI would like to upgrade my plan to {plan}.%0D%0A%0D%0AAccount email: {email}%0D%0A%0D%0AThank you!
billing.statusCancelingMessage: Your subscription will end on {date}. You can reactivate anytime.
billing.statusPastDueMessage: Your payment failed. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
billing.checkoutError: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
billing.portalError: Failed to open billing portal. Please try again.
billing.purchaseError: Failed to purchase quota pack. Please try again.
billing.quotaPackInvestigationsDesc: Add 10 extra investigations to your current period
billing.quotaPackEventsDesc: Add 1,000 extra events to your current period
